title: Mythos Enters Government - TCR 04/17/26
description:
The White House prepared to distribute Claude Mythos to six Cabinet-level departments including Defense and Treasury, global finance leaders at the IMF treated one AI model as a standing agenda item requiring coordinated government response, Anthropic released Opus 4.7 as a staged proving ground for Mythos-class safeguards, and a robot trained on two air fryer episodes learned to cook a sweet potato it was never taught to make.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-17-2026/

The administration that designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk six weeks ago is now preparing to place Mythos inside the departments that administer defense, finance, justice, diplomacy, commerce, and homeland security - while the D.C. Circuit's split ruling remains unresolved and May 19 oral arguments are still on the calendar. At the IMF spring meetings in Washington, Canada's finance minister compared Mythos to the Strait of Hormuz, the ECB president acknowledged no governance framework exists for the capability, and Barclays' CEO said simply "this is what the new world is going to be." Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.7 and explicitly positioned it as less capable than Mythos on every benchmark, revealing the model's deeper purpose: testing cybersecurity safeguards that will eventually gate broader Mythos-class deployment, with a new Cyber Verification Program for security professionals feeding findings into staged release plans. Physical Intelligence published research showing its π0.7 model directed robots to perform tasks they were never trained on, synthesizing functional understanding from as few as two tangentially relevant training episodes. University of Oklahoma researchers identified FGF21 as a hormone that reverses obesity through a hindbrain mechanism entirely distinct from GLP-1 drugs, while UCLA scientists reversed fatty liver disease by clearing senescent macrophages without any dietary changes. New England's largest grid battery came online at 250 MW with a 700 MW successor in development, and U.S. community solar crossed 10 GW of installed capacity.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-17-2026/
